# Ahmad Jafarov

Full-stack / React Native Engineer specializing in TypeScript, React Native, Expo, and Nest.js. Building mobile apps and web systems from Baku, Azerbaijan.

> Lead Frontend Developer at Ferrum Capital building internal CRMs, ERP tools, and mobile factoring apps with 100,000+ active users. Obsessed with understanding how things work under the hood. Open to remote work and global clients.

## About

- **URL**: `/`
- **Description**: Personal introduction, approach to software development, and ASCII art wave animation. Learn about my 2+ years of experience, current role, and philosophy on building accessible, usable products.

## Experience

- **URL**: `/experience`
- **Description**: Work history and professional roles. Current position as Lead Frontend Developer at Ferrum Capital (August 2023 - Present) and Software Developer at InnoSight LLC (March 2024 - April 2025). Includes responsibilities in team leadership, architecture decisions, CI/CD implementation, and full-stack development.

## Projects

- **URL**: `/projects`
- **Description**: Portfolio of 5 key projects including Song Pal Bot, PixelPro CRM, Ferrum Capital Mobile, 4YOU mental health platform, and CodeMark interactive notebook.

## Blog

- **URL**: `/blog`
- **Description**: Articles and thoughts on software development, engineering practices, and technology.

## Tech Stack

**Primary**: TypeScript, React Native, Expo, Next.js, FastAPI  
**Secondary**: Nest.js (learning), Go (learning)  
**Tools**: PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Zod, TanStack Query, React Hook Form, shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS
